mapper.insert: INSERT INTO climbing_logs (user_id, gym_id, climbed_on, grade_counts, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gymId}, #{climbedOn}, #{gradeCounts}::jsonb, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, gym_id, climbed_on, grade_counts, memo, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM climbing_logs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, gym_id, climbed_on, grade_counts, memo, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM climbing_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND climbed_on BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} ORDER BY climbed_on DESC, id DESC

SELECT recorded_date AS date, COUNT(*)::int AS video_count, COALESCE(SUM(duration_seconds), 0)::bigint AS total_duration_seconds FROM videos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status <> 'failed' AND recorded_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY recorded_date ORDER BY recorded_date

SELECT id, user_id, gym_id, climbed_on, grade_counts, memo, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM climbing_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND climbed_on = #{date} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE climbing_logs SET gym_id = #{gymId}, climbed_on = #{climbedOn}, grade_counts = #{gradeCounts}::jsonb, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE climbing_logs SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
